title: ColorZero
text: ColorZero Enables the use of default system colors as the foreground and background colors for objects on forms. ColorZero = on | off Default value on File section [upi] Description A Uniface object can be assigned to color code No , which means that the object no longer uses Uniface index colors, but is assigned to colors determined by the operating system. Note: It is recommended that you keep the default value, because setting ColorZero to off causes labels to use index color 0 as the background color, instead of the background color of the parent object. All the labels use this color unless they are explicitly set to another color. Related Links Uniface Index Colors Uniface index colors are combinations of foreground an background colors that are identified by a color code, a number from 0 to 63. SystemColors Enables the use of default system colors as the foreground and background colors in forms. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
